en: If your company is required to comply with Costa Rica Workers' Compensation requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
Costa Rica Workers' Compensation SRT Applicability Assessment
Is your company required to comply with Costa Rica's Workers' Compensation requirements as regulated by INS (National Insurance Institute) and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Costa Rica's Worker's Compensation requirements.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
The company does not have any employees in Costa Rica.
By providing your electronic signature, you confirm that the information submitted in this questionnaire is true, complete, and accurate in accordance with Costa Rican legislation.
